title: Your platform,
full_text:
Your platform, inside ChatGPT. Halo. Claude.
Your competitors are already inside ChatGPT, Claude, and Halo. We partner with a select few Pro customers to co-build experiences we couldn't build alone. For them, and for everyone who comes after. Your competitors are already inside ChatGPT, Claude, and Halo. We partner with a select few Pro customers to co-build experiences we couldn't build alone. For them, and for everyone who comes after.
Book a Discovery Call Leave Your Details
ChatGPT 5.2
Plan me a week in Bali
Just a demo
Design Partners
Layla.ai
AI-powered travel planning platform
2M+ itineraries generated
Jettly
Private aviation platform
20,000+ vetted aircraft globally
Hub71
Abu Dhabi's global tech ecosystem
400+ startups in the ecosystem
What you get
Co-built AI experience
A tailored experience built around your APIs, your brand, and your workflows. Deployed across ChatGPT, Claude, and Halo.
Roadmap influence
Your problems shape what the platform can do next. New capabilities we build with you become capabilities every future customer benefits from.
Selective, not for sale
Design Partnership isn't a paid tier. We invite Pro customers when there's mutual fit: a unique experience for you, and a learning that expands the platform for everyone.
Multi-Platform Deployment
Your app, deployed across ChatGPT, Claude, and Halo from a single integration.
What you bring
Design Partnership is a collaboration, not a service. The work only makes sense when both sides invest real time and engineering attention.
Working APIs
Your MCP AI app needs to call into something real. Public or private APIs we can integrate with.
6+ weeks of close collaboration
Plan on six or more weeks of active co-development with our team before launch. This isn't a hands-off engagement.
Documentation
API docs, product context, and anything else our team needs to build the right experience.
Design guidelines
Brand assets and design direction so the experience feels native across ChatGPT, Claude, and Halo.
How it works
Mutual fit conversation
We learn about your platform, your APIs, and your goals, then decide together whether a Design Partnership makes sense for both sides.
Share APIs, docs, and design guidelines
Give us access to your APIs, documentation, and brand assets so we can build to spec.
Co-build the prototype
Six or more weeks of close iteration. We bring the platform; you bring product context and engineering attention.
New APIs if the experience needs them
Sometimes the right experience needs APIs that don't exist yet. We design and build them together.
Launch & continuous improvement
Go live across ChatGPT, Claude, and Halo. We keep improving based on real usage.
Common questions
Who is this for?
What's expected of me?
How long is the collaboration?
What does it cost?
What platforms will my app be available on?
Do I own the MCP AI app?
Ready to get your platform inside AI assistants?
Layla.ai, Jettly, and Hub71 are co-building with us. If you're a Pro customer with APIs, real engineering bandwidth, and an experience worth co-creating, talk to us.
Book a Discovery Call Leave Your Details
